# Toronto Basement Underpinning - Toronto

> Toronto Basement Underpinning is a General Contractor in Toronto, Ontario, Canada, providing basement underpinning, lowering, interior waterproofing, sump pump installation, basement finishing, concrete foundation repair, and plumbing and drain services. Established in 2006, the company holds Fully Licensed General Contractor and Fully Insured credentials and operates 20 dedicated crews across the Greater Toronto Area. The company serves homeowners in Toronto seeking to increase livable space, real estate investors creating basement rental apartments, and families needing higher ceilings for structural comfort.

---

## Basement Finishing

**URL:** https://torontobasementunderpinning.ca/basement-finishing/

Complete framing, rough-ins, drywall, flooring and trim to convert a raw basement into a legal apartment or luxury living suite.

Once the underpinning crew is off-site and the new slab has cured, our finishing crews take over — framing, electrical and plumbing rough-ins, insulation, drywall, flooring, and trim. Because we plan finishing alongside underpinning from day one, ductwork heights, beam locations, and bathroom rough-ins are designed for the new ceiling height before the first concrete pour. The result is a legal-apartment-ready or luxury-finished basement that uses every inch of the structural gain.

---

## Concrete & Foundation Repair

**URL:** https://torontobasementunderpinning.ca/concrete-foundation-repair/

General underground plumbing, drain maintenance, and foundational concrete repairs to support a dry and structurally sound home.

---

## Drawings & Permits

**URL:** https://torontobasementunderpinning.ca/drawings-permits/

Coordination with architects to provide proper structural drawings and secure necessary city permits.

---

## Interior Waterproofing

**URL:** https://torontobasementunderpinning.ca/interior-waterproofing/

Complete interior waterproofing of all foundation walls to prevent flood and water damage, frequently paired with the underpinning process.

---

## Plumbing & Drains

**URL:** https://torontobasementunderpinning.ca/plumbing-drain-services/

General underground plumbing, drain maintenance, and drain services.

---

## Sump Pumps & Battery Backups

**URL:** https://torontobasementunderpinning.ca/sump-pumps/

Installation of robust sump pumps and backup systems to actively manage basement water accumulation.

---
